{{CargoRelic
|name=Lu Ban Lock
|class_id=22418
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=11-19
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Nov 19, 221 AD, Lu Ban Lock gradually began to become popular among the people.<br>Lu Ban Lock, also known as Kongming Lock or Bagua Lock, is a toy made based on ancient Chinese carpentry joints. The most common type consists of six wooden columns and has a special structure that is easy to disassemble and difficult to assemble. It is beneficial for relaxing the body and mind and developing the brain.
|fame=45
|art=28
|fth=23
|civ=27
|tech=31
|ss1=Dragon Minion HP +1%
|ss2=Dragon Minion HP +2%
|ss3=Dragon Minion HP +3%
|ss4=Dragon Minion HP +5%
|ss7=Dragon Minion HP +5%<br>Dragon Minion HP +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Cathay skill I.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Snail DEF +20
}}
